parameters.bodyParametersJson: ={{ JSON.stringify({ text: $json.notificationText, route: $json.route, channel: $json.channel, source: $json.source, eventType: $json.eventType, severity: $json.severity, summary: $json.summary, details: $json.details, occurredAt: $json.occurredAt, correlationId: $json.correlationId, metadata: $json.metadata }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ ({ status: 'accepted', route: $node['Build Escalation Message'].json.route, correlationId: $node['Build Escalation Message'].json.correlationId, severity: $node['Build Escalation Message'].json.severity, slackAttempted: true, slackStatus: $json.error ? 'failed' : 'sent', receivedAt: $node['Build Escalation Message'].json.receivedAt }) }}

={{ ({ status: 'accepted', route: $node['Build Escalation Message'].json.route, correlationId: $node['Build Escalation Message'].json.correlationId, severity: $node['Build Escalation Message'].json.severity, slackAttempted: false, slackStatus: 'not_configured', receivedAt: $node['Build Escalation Message'].json.receivedAt }) }}
